contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Post-repackaging cleanup: gap analysis, implementation plan & Sophia handoff
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/629
  
  Details:
  Analyzed the four known post-repackaging gaps in dao_client and created a comprehensive implementation plan for closing them.
  
  **What changed:**
  - Investigated batch b08d324b (7 nibs → 3 ceremonial CC + 15 chocolate bar CB QRs) to verify the repackaging GAS writes only Currencies cols A/B/N/O
  - Identified that dao_client cannot handle any of the 4 post-repackaging cleanup tasks today (deplete inputs, add output locations, set isSerializable/SKU/farm info, rebuild inventory snapshot)
  - Drafted POST_REPACKAGING_CLEANUP_PLAN.md — full spec for a new post_repackaging_cleanup.py module (~579 lines)
  - Registered the plan in SOPHIA_HANDOFFS.md, pinged Sophia, debugged stale-clone issue, re-parked her in thread 7987
  - Created agentic_ai_context PR #629 to satisfy contribution audit trail
  
  **Why:**
  Every repackaging batch currently requires ~20 min of manual gspread ad-hoc edits. The plan hands off the automation build to Sophia, with detailed CLI spec, 18 unit test cases, integration tests, 5 UAT scenarios, and acceptance criteria.
  
  **Evidence:**
  - GitHub PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/629
  - Plan file: POST_REPACKAGING_CLEANUP_PLAN.md (commits a27bc48, ea9fdba)
  - Sophia handoff: thread 7987 in TrueSight DAO Ops
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
